parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Activate the connection to the sensor. Only one SICK node can be active in a project at time. If a second node is activated it will cause an error message.

parameters.name: reinitialize
parameters.label: Reinitialize
parameters.description: Restart the connection with the sensor. This will shutdown the connection and reinitialize using the current parameters. You can also toggle the Active parameter off and on again to reinitialize the s

parameters.name: launchfile
parameters.label: Launch File
parameters.description: A path to the launch file to configure the sensor. A valid launch file is necessary to connect to the sensor. Sample launch files for each sensor can be downloaded from SICK's website. Advanced config

parameters.name: deviceaddress
parameters.label: Device Address
parameters.description: The IP address for the sensor. If this parameter is blank, the default address in the launch file will be used.

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Port
parameters.description: The port number for the sensor. If this parameter is blank, the default port number in the launch file will be used.

parameters.name: customargs
parameters.label: Custom Arguments
parameters.description: Additional arguments that should be included when initializing the sensor. This can be used to customize parameters for individual sensors while still using the same launch file. Arguments should be i

parameters.name: red
parameters.label: Red
parameters.description: The name of the data field that will be assigned to the red component of the output image e.g. 'x'. The available fields will vary depending on the sensor and can be selected from the flyout menu to t

parameters.name: green
parameters.label: Green
parameters.description: The name of the data field that will be assigned to the green component of the output image e.g. 'g'. The available fields will vary depending on the sensor and can be selected from the flyout menu to

parameters.name: blue
parameters.label: Blue
parameters.description: The name of the data field that will be assigned to the blue component of the output image e.g. 'z'. The available fields will vary depending on the sensor and can be selected from the flyout menu to

parameters.name: alpha
parameters.label: Alpha
parameters.description: The name of the data field that will be assigned to the alpha component of the output image e.g. 'one'. The available fields will vary depending on the sensor and can be selected from the flyout menu
